title: Personal Portfolio Site
description: Create a professional portfolio website to showcase your projects and skills using reusable React components and basic styling.
problemStatement:
# Personal Portfolio Site Build your online presence! In this project, you will create a multi-section portfolio site to display your work, skills, and contact information. ## Core Features 1. **Header & Navigation** - A responsive navigation bar that links to different sections of the page. 2. **Hero Section** - An introduction area with your name, role, and a brief catchy headline. 3. **Projects Grid** - A collection of 'Project Cards'. Each card should display a title, description, and tags for technologies used. 4. **Skills Component** - A section listing your technical skills (e.g., React, JavaScript, CSS). ## Requirements - Define a clear component hierarchy (e.g., `Header`, `Hero`, `ProjectList`, `ProjectCard`). - Use props to pass data to the `ProjectCard` components. - Apply basic CSS for layout (Flexbox or Grid). ## Example Flow ```jsx const ProjectCard = ({ title, desc }) => (

{title}

{desc}

); ```
requirements: Effective use of props to create reusable UI elements.
hints: Map over an array of project objects to dynamically render your project cards.
Use a functional component for each section to keep the logic manageable.
Keep your styles in a separate CSS file or use inline styles for quick prototyping.
expectedOutput: A responsive, single-page React application that professionally showcases personal information and projects.
